theme.title: Expanded Past Tenses
theme.description: Practice longer sentences using Spanish past tenses including pretérito perfecto, indefinido, and imperfecto.

lesson.title: Daily Life in the Past
lesson.instructions: Translate the longer sentences into Spanish using the appropriate past tense.

exercises.prompt: Yesterday I walked through the old neighborhood where I used to play with my friends when I was a child.
exercises.answer: Ayer caminé por el viejo barrio donde jugaba con mis amigos cuando era niño
exercises.explanation: Uses indefinido for the completed action caminé and imperfect for habitual past actions jugaba and era.

exercises.prompt: Last night we watched a movie that we had wanted to see for many years.
exercises.answer: Anoche vimos una película que habíamos querido ver por muchos años
exercises.explanation: Indefinido vimos for the finished action and pluscuamperfecto habíamos querido.

exercises.prompt: When I arrived at the restaurant my friends were already sitting at the table and talking.
exercises.answer: Cuando llegué al restaurante mis amigos ya estaban sentados en la mesa y hablaban
exercises.explanation: Indefinido llegué marks the interrupting action while imperfect describes the ongoing situation.

exercises.prompt: We traveled through three different cities before we finally found the small village on the coast.
exercises.answer: Viajamos por tres ciudades diferentes antes de que finalmente encontramos el pequeño pueblo en la costa
exercises.explanation: Indefinido viajamos and encontramos describe completed past events.

exercises.prompt: While the children were playing in the park their parents were talking quietly on a nearby bench.
exercises.answer: Mientras los niños jugaban en el parque sus padres hablaban tranquilamente en un banco cercano
exercises.explanation: Imperfect tense describes two ongoing simultaneous actions.

exercises.prompt: I have visited that museum several times because I really liked the ancient paintings.
exercises.answer: He visitado ese museo varias veces porque me gustaban mucho las pinturas antiguas
exercises.explanation: Perfect tense he visitado for life experience and imperfect gustaban for general feeling.

exercises.prompt: When we were young we often stayed up late and told stories around the fire.
exercises.answer: Cuando éramos jóvenes a menudo nos quedábamos despiertos hasta tarde y contábamos historias alrededor del fuego
exercises.explanation: Imperfect used for habitual past actions.

exercises.prompt: The storm started suddenly while we were walking along the beach.
exercises.answer: La tormenta empezó de repente mientras caminábamos por la playa
exercises.explanation: Indefinido empezó interrupts the ongoing imperfect action caminábamos.

exercises.prompt: My grandmother told us stories about her childhood whenever we visited her house.
exercises.answer: Mi abuela nos contaba historias sobre su infancia cada vez que visitábamos su casa

exercises.prompt: By the time the train arrived we had already waited for almost an hour.
exercises.answer: Cuando llegó el tren ya habíamos esperado casi una hora
exercises.explanation: Pluscuamperfecto habíamos esperado describes an action completed before another past event.
